name: Limitation on Financial Status Audit Techniques

eligibility.description: Taxpayers undergoing an IRS examination where the agent attempts to use financial status or lifestyle probes without prior evidence of underreporting.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: The IRS is prohibited from using 'lifestyle' or 'economic reality' examination techniques to find unreported income unless they already have a reasonable indication that such income exists.
